selected_important_turn.text: I have checked and see that it is in the rainy season! I know I need to pack some extra firewood if you can spare me some??
selected_important_turn.why_important: This is the first explicit self-oriented request and it sets a more zero-sum, demand-oriented tone. It starts the substantive allocation phase and directly shapes expectations about who will give up scarce firewood.
selected_important_turn.why_improvable_or_worth_amplifying: The request is immediate and framed as a personal need without checking the other party's priorities or offering compensation. That risks locking the exchange into a simple give/take rather than opening integrative possibilities, and it misses information that would allow a Pareto-superior trade.
selected_important_turn.better_direction: Before asking for specific units, elicit whether they have surplus or ask about their priorities (e.g., "Do you have extra wood, or would you prefer something else in exchange?"). If they do have surplus, propose a conditional trade (offer something in return) rather than a unilateral ask.

expected_effect_on_negotiation.joint_gain: increase (eliciting preferences and making conditional offers opens integrative trades)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.fairness: increase (explicitly offering compensation balances the burden)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.ease_of_agreement: increase (less likely to create resentment or surprise concessions)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.relationship: improve (shows concern for the other's position and avoids a demanding tone)

value2reason.Low: There is a lot of rain water I can collect and boil down that is safe to drink.
value2reason.Medium: Due to the rainy season there has been a disease go through the vegetation in the area, so I would like to be prepared in case the same has happened where I am going.
value2reason.High: It is the rainy season where I am traveling, so the abundance of dry firewood to scavenge for is slim.

value2reason.Low: water is very essential for me. Hence I keep more,  then I gave it least priority
value2reason.Medium: During the trip, food is important. But other people may bring other food package. Hence, I choose this one is  medium priority
value2reason.High: It may be used for other people also. So, only I bring additional

dialogue.text: Hello there! Are you getting excited for your upcoming trip?! I am so very excited to test my skills!
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Hi friend! I'm very excited to go to the trip
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Great! Have you checked to see what the weather has been like in the area you are going to??
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Definitely I will checked. I m eager to prepare each & every things for the trip
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I have checked and see that it is in the rainy season! I know I need to pack some extra firewood if you can spare me some??
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I have some firewood, but I need to make sure we both have enough for the trip. How about I give you 2 firewood packages and 1 food package, and you give me 2 water packages? That way we’re both prepared for the rain.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I appreciate your offer, but I need more firewood than that. Would you be open to giving me 3 firewood packages in exchange for 2 water and 1 food package? It would really help me prepare for the rainy season.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I'm willing to trade 2 water and 1 food package for 3 firewood packages. It aligns with my priority of ensuring we have enough firewood for the rainy season. Let’s make this work!
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: That sounds fair! Let me check if there’s anything else you might need. I’m happy to adjust if you have other priorities in mind.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Deal confirmed! I’ll take 3 firewood, 2 water, and 1 food. You get the remaining 3 water, 2 food, and 0 firewood. Let’s head to the trip!
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: The deal has already been confirmed. I am leaving now.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1
